zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Sachsen於1329年11月23日出生在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格時，她的父親Friedrich II von Sachsen18歲，母親Mathilde von Bayern16歲。她於1356年與Friedrich V von Nuremberg在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀可萊斯 魏瑪耶拿結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年4月21日在德國貝也纽伦堡享年45歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫費特萬根海爾布洛倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Sachsen于1329年11月23日出生在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格时，她的父亲Friedrich II von Sachsen18岁，母亲Mathilde von Bayern16岁。她于1356年与Friedrich V von Nuremberg在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀可萊斯 魏瑪耶拿结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年4月21日在德国貝也纽伦堡享年45岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫費特萬根海爾布洛倫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer, Armin, Claus, Heinz, Hildegarde, Johannes, Kurt, Wolfgang.

variants.name: Sachs
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Lower Saxony (German Niedersachsen) in northern Germany. The region is named for the ancient Germanic tribe that settled there in Roman times, whose name derives from an ancient Germanic word (preserved in Old Saxon and Old High German), sahs ‘knife, sword’. The area in central Germany called Sachsen was named after the line of princes who owned title to the northern territories in 1422.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): surname adopted in memory of persecuted forebears, an acronym of the Hebrew phrase Zera Qodesh SHemo ‘his name is of the seed of holiness’. Compare Socks and Zacks .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Sachsen was born on 23 November 1329, in Wartburg, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany, her father, Friedrich II von Sachsen, was 18 and her mother, Mathilde von Bayern, was 16. She married Friedrich V von Nuremberg in 1356, in Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 April 1375, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 45, and was buried in Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Sachsen est née le 23 novembre 1329, à Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich II von Sachsen, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Bayern, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich V von Nuremberg en 1356, à Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1375, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Sachsen am 23. November 1329 in Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich II von Sachsen 18 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Bayern 16. Sie hat 1356 in Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland Friedrich V von Nuremberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1375 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Sachsenが1329年11月23日にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチワートブルグで生まれた時，父Friedrich II von Sachsenは18歳，母Mathilde von Bayernは16歳であった。1356年にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチクレイス ウエイマージェナでFriedrich V von Nurembergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年4月21日にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグで45歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチフエウチトワンジェンヘイルブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Ansbach, Bavari: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 프우트왕 헤이브론
ko.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 위마 제나
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Sachsen(이)가 1329년 11월 23일 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 워트버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich II von Sachsen(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Bayern(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1356년 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 위마 제나에서 Friedrich V von Nuremberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 4월 21일 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 프우트왕 헤이브론에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Sachsen nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1329, em Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich II von Sachsen, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Bayern, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich V von Nuremberg em 1356, em Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1375, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: джена, крис вимар, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Sachsen родилась 23 ноября 1329 г. в местности вартбург, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия, её отцу по имени Friedrich II von Sachsen было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Bayern, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich V von Nuremberg в 1356 г. в местности джена, крис вимар, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 апреля 1375 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности хилбронн, феучтванген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.23 NOV 1329–21 April 1375: 23 de noviembre de 1329–21 de abril de 1375
es.Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Ansbach, Bavari: Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania
es.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Sachsen nació el 23 de noviembre de 1329, en Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich II von Sachsen, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Bayern, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Friedrich V von Nuremberg en 1356, en Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1375, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Heilbronn, Feuchtwangen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania.
